summary: First-finish smoke: All backend API routes (/api/profile, /api/projects with filters, /api/contact validation and happy path) work as specified. Frontend hero, role tabs, project search, skills (5 groups with progress bars), experience/education/certifications, and contact form (validation toast + success toast) all functional.
passed: GET /api/profile 200 - keys: profile/experience/education/skills/certifications/roles; 5 roles present; name=Abhishek Banaj
GET /api/projects 200 - counts {all:50, ai-engineer:7, data-scientist:26, data-analyst:21, data-engineer:1, full-stack:16}
Hero: name, headline, avatar, hero-github, hero-linkedin, hero-email visible
All 5 role tabs render; clicking role-tab-ai-engineer shows exactly 7 project cards
projects-search input filters to 1 card for 'stock' (visible subset)
5 skill-group-* rendered with 21 progress width bars
Experience (1 item), Education (2 items), Certifications (6 items) render
contact-form: empty submit shows sonner toast 'Please fill all fields'; valid submit shows 'Message sent! Abhishek will get back to you soon.'
notes: Contact form input testids are contact-name-input/contact-email-input/contact-message-input (not contact-name/email/message). No blockers.
